name: Mulligan
description: Re-throw your next shot and take whichever result you like better.

name: Gimme Putt
description: Any putt inside 10 feet on your next hole counts as made.

name: Practice Stroke
description: Take one practice throw before your real shot next hole — no penalty.

name: Second Wind
description: Your worst throw of the next hole doesn't count against your score.

name: Home Turf
description: You choose your own tee position on your next hole.

name: Phoenix Round
description: Erase your worst hole score of the round so far and replace it with par.

name: Untouchable
description: You're immune to the next disrupt power thrown at you. Shrug it off.

name: Off-Hand Only
description: Target must throw their next shot with their non-dominant hand.

name: No Run-Up
description: Target must throw their next shot from a dead standstill.

name: Silent Treatment
description: Target can't ask anyone for advice or a line read on their next throw.

name: Switch Discs
description: Target must throw their next shot with a disc you pick from their bag.

name: Blindfold Toss
description: Target throws one shot blindfolded, with a spotter allowed to point only.

name: Opposite Hand Putt
description: Target's next putt must be thrown with their non-dominant hand.

name: Sit-Down Throw
description: Target must throw their next shot from a seated position.

name: Backwards Tee
description: Target tees off facing away from the basket and must turn to throw.

name: Bag Check
description: Target leaves their bag at the tee and plays the whole hole with one disc.
